hypothesis: If an EfficientNet-B0 CNN is pretrained on a data-rich additive-free NCM SEM dataset and then fine-tuned on the small additive-induced target set, then it will achieve higher accuracy and F1 on nine-way classification of NCM composition and aging state than models trained only on the target set or using pretraining without fine-tuning, because transferable microstructural features learned from the source domain generalize across the additive-induced domain shift.
